top_risks.title: Tuition collection below target
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Inspect overdue invoices, aging buckets, and payment plans.

top_risks.title: Overdue student payments above limit
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Review student receivables by aging and department.

top_risks.title: Negative or zero operating result
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Review revenue shortfalls and expense drivers by department.

top_risks.title: Negative or low cash flow
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Review operating, scholarship, and capital cash outflows.

top_risks.title: Facilities category overspending
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Review the category by department and underlying transactions.

top_risks.title: Services category overspending
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Review the category by department and underlying transactions.

top_risks.title: Supplies category overspending
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Review the category by department and underlying transactions.

top_risks.title: Technology category overspending
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Review the category by department and underlying transactions.

top_risks.title: Payroll exceeds revenue threshold
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Review payroll by department, overtime, benefits, and headcount.

top_risks.title: Administration overspending exceeds flag threshold
top_risks.recommended_next_check: Inspect department expense categories, payroll, and vendors.
